title: Prumnopitys standleyi

Prumnopitys standleyi is native to New Zealand and is considered an endangered species. It belongs to the genus Prumnopitys, which is a group of coniferous trees native to the Southern Hemisphere. Prumnopitys standleyi is also known as the New Zealand yellow pine or Standsley's podocarp.
